entity.name: Zain Dana Harper
entity.description: Maintainer of Project Telos and related local-first AI workflow tools. Project Telos focuses on source provenance, workspace context, task routing, action receipts, browser evidence, MCP host freshness, and verification packets for inspectable AI-assisted work.

projects.name: Project Telos
projects.description: Project Telos is a local-first, proof-native AI workbench. It connects source intake, workspace maps, routing ledgers, falsifiable verification, action receipts, browser evidence, model-foundry lanes, Learning Forge labs, and OSS proof packets through CLI and MCP surfaces. The current source checkout reports a 70-tool catalog across Gather, Index, Forum, Crucible, and Telos.

channels.description: Contact the maintainer for funding, grant, sponsorship, or support agreement details. Public payment details are intentionally not included in this draft.

plans.name: Public hardening and adoption sprint
plans.description: One-time support for MCP host freshness, action receipts, browser evidence packets, OSS proof packets, documentation, demo packaging, and early user feedback loops.
